attacking_style: Not a primary attacker; focuses on positioning for sprint finishes, particularly from technical final corners where positioning discipline matters more than raw power.
team_tactics: Limited evidence of dedicated lead-out support; appears to operate with individual positioning responsibility, relying on personal corner exits and spatial navigation in finale chaos.
terrain_preference: Flat stages with technical finales and headwind conditions where sustained pace favors positioning over pure sprint speed. Struggles when race situation requires real-time tactical awareness.
vulnerability: Critical race awareness gaps - demonstrated inability to track breakaway situations while in chase groups, suggesting poor communication with team or failure to process race radio information in decisive moments.
key_patterns: Strong in headwind pace scenarios, maintaining position through sustained effort (2 observations)
Excellent cornering and technical positioning skills in final kilometers (2 observations)
Severe deficit in race situation awareness during complex tactical scenarios (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: showed physical capacity to hold GC jersey and win chase sprints, but tactical awareness issues create unpredictable ceiling
